name: PT Lenox Pasifik Investama Tbk
summary: PT Lenox Pasifik Investama Tbk provides investment management services in Indonesia. The company was formerly known as PT Lippo Securities Tbk and changed its name to PT Lenox Pasifik Investama Tbk in September 2020. The company was founded in 1989 and is based in Tangerang, Indonesia. PT Lippo Securities Tbk operates as a subsidiary of PT Inti Anugrah Pratama.
